Down Syndrome Tests

Down Syndrome Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are Down syndrome tests? 
Down syndrome tests check whether a developing fetus may have Down syndrome , a chromosome disorder caused by having an extra copy or piece of chromosome 21 .
Chromosomes are tiny "packages" in your cells that contain your genes. Genes carry information, called DNA, that controls what you look like and how your body works. Normally, you're bor
